rationale: No headlines this cycle meaningfully affect Portugal's cost of living, tourism, energy prices, or domestic stability.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is a minor safety incident; no systemic impact on Portuguese tourism or economy.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A UK-Japan investment deal is a distant trade development with negligible direct impact on Portugal's economy.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: G7 protests in Geneva are background EU noise with no direct consequence for Portuguese residents.
